race.comment: Despite failing to fill a placing in six runs to date, DANCE WITH DESTINY (9) looks well placed to open her account. Passed half of the Australian Oaks field in the straight two back then raced wide and did well to finish her race off over 1900m at this track last start. Nicely in under today's scale and will relish getting to 2200m. JADE SUNSET (10) is another maiden with definite claims. Raced handy but lacked a change of gears when fifth over 1800m at Hawkesbury last time. Will race up on the speed and keep coming. CANJUSTIFY (8) made up serious late ground to win her maiden over 1900m here recently. Lightly raced filly who can go to this next level. SICCIUS (4) is another sparingly raced three-year-old open to improvement.
